title: Nvidia DeOptimized
description: A version of Nvidia Optimized that... isn't so optimized and looks good.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e277045f167adce737badf4019e201775551b14.png)

### Eye-Popping Graphics
Experience Minecraft like never before... visually.  This modpack prioritizes stunning visuals over performance. Prepare for lush landscapes, vibrant colors, and breathtaking details.

### Modern-ish Standards
Supports most modern Minecraft features.  Shaders may be possible, but no promises.

### Mostly Bug Free
Thoroughly tested for stability, but expect some quirks.  While we've aimed for stability, modded Minecraft can be unpredictable.

### Flex Your GPU (If You Dare)
Push your Nvidia card to its limits (and maybe a little beyond).  Show off those ray-traced reflections (if your system can handle it).
